subject: [AAF] Solve expired AAF certificate
commit_message:
[AAF] Solve expired AAF certificate

Add updated certificates to cert-wrapper and mount files
to aaf_config containers.
Update certInitializer template and tls-init of
dcaegen2-services template to use the new files as well

Issue-ID: AAF-1217

Change-Id: I9f68d2fbee52da4752d6a8dd189a976b12259a08
Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure 3: Chained-CI build started (pipeline id: 1008454269), max time: 24400 seconds

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-kohn-commit-lint/23/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-kohn-commit-lint/23/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-kohn-commit-lint/23/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-kohn-commit-lint/23
